## ATAC

```{r atac-prep, include=FALSE}
library(Signac)
n_peaks <- nrow(scMultiData[["ATAC"]])
n_cells <- ncol(scMultiData)

DefaultAssay(scMultiData) <- "ATAC"
if (!"nucleosome_signal" %in% colnames(scMultiData@meta.data)) {
  scMultiData <- tryCatch(
    NucleosomeSignal(scMultiData, assay = "ATAC"),
    error = function(e) { message("NucleosomeSignal skipped: ", conditionMessage(e)); scMultiData }
  )
}
if (!"TSS.enrichment" %in% colnames(scMultiData@meta.data)) {
  scMultiData <- tryCatch(
    TSSEnrichment(scMultiData, assay = "ATAC", fast = TRUE),
    error = function(e) { message("TSSEnrichment skipped: ", conditionMessage(e)); scMultiData }
  )
}

atac_qc <- data.frame(
  metric = c("Peaks", "Cells", "Mean fragments / cell",
             "Median TSS enrichment", "Median nucleosome signal"),
  value  = c(n_peaks, n_cells,
             round(mean(scMultiData$nCount_ATAC), 1),
             if ("TSS.enrichment" %in% colnames(scMultiData@meta.data))
               round(median(scMultiData$TSS.enrichment, na.rm = TRUE), 2) else NA,
             if ("nucleosome_signal" %in% colnames(scMultiData@meta.data))
               round(median(scMultiData$nucleosome_signal, na.rm = TRUE), 3) else NA)
)

cluster_col <- if ("seurat_clusters" %in% colnames(scMultiData@meta.data)) {
  "seurat_clusters"
} else NULL

has_ga <- "GeneActivity" %in% Assays(scMultiData)
DefaultAssay(scMultiData) <- "RNA"
```

**ATAC QC**

```{r atac-qc, echo=FALSE}
knitr::kable(atac_qc, col.names = c("Metric", "Value"))
```

### QC distributions {.tabset}

#### Fragment counts

```{r atac-frag, echo=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
p <- VlnPlot(scMultiData, features = "nCount_ATAC",
             group.by = "Sample", pt.size = 0) +
  scale_y_log10() + NoLegend() +
  ggtitle("ATAC fragments per cell")
print(p)
```

#### TSS enrichment

```{r atac-tss, echo=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
if ("TSS.enrichment" %in% colnames(scMultiData@meta.data)) {
  p <- VlnPlot(scMultiData, features = "TSS.enrichment",
               group.by = "Sample", pt.size = 0) + NoLegend() +
    ggtitle("TSS enrichment")
  print(p)
}
```

#### Nucleosome signal

```{r atac-nuc, echo=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
if ("nucleosome_signal" %in% colnames(scMultiData@meta.data)) {
  p <- VlnPlot(scMultiData, features = "nucleosome_signal",
               group.by = "Sample", pt.size = 0) + NoLegend() +
    ggtitle("Nucleosome signal")
  print(p)
}
```

### ATAC UMAP {.tabset}

#### By Sample

```{r atac-umap-sample, echo=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=7}
if ("atac.umap" %in% names(scMultiData@reductions)) {
  p <- DimPlot(scMultiData, reduction = "atac.umap",
               group.by = "Sample", raster = FALSE) +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1) +
    ggtitle("ATAC UMAP - by Sample")
  print(p)
}
```

#### By RNA cluster

```{r atac-umap-cluster, echo=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=7}
if ("atac.umap" %in% names(scMultiData@reductions) && !is.null(cluster_col)) {
  p <- DimPlot(scMultiData, reduction = "atac.umap",
               group.by = cluster_col, raster = FALSE,
               label = TRUE, repel = TRUE) +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1) +
    ggtitle("ATAC UMAP - by RNA cluster")
  print(p)
}
```

### Gene activity FeaturePlots

```{r atac-gene-activity, echo=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
if (has_ga) {
  DefaultAssay(scMultiData) <- "GeneActivity"
  ga_mat <- tryCatch(
    as.matrix(GetAssayData(scMultiData, assay = "GeneActivity", layer = "data")),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  ga_means <- if (is.matrix(ga_mat)) rowMeans(ga_mat) else NULL
  top_ga <- if (!is.null(ga_means)) names(sort(ga_means, decreasing = TRUE))[1:min(8L, length(ga_means))] else NULL
  red <- if ("atac.umap" %in% names(scMultiData@reductions)) "atac.umap" else "umap"
  if (!is.null(top_ga) && length(top_ga) > 0) {
    p <- FeaturePlot(scMultiData, features = top_ga, reduction = red,
                     raster = FALSE, ncol = 4) &
      theme(aspect.ratio = 1) &
      scale_color_viridis_c(option = "D")
    print(p)
  } else {
    cat("No gene-activity values to plot.\n")
  }
  DefaultAssay(scMultiData) <- "RNA"
} else {
  cat("GeneActivity assay not available - skipped.\n")
}
```
